summary: Software Engineer with 3+ years building enterprise production systems at Bank of America and graduate-level research spanning NLP, multimodal models, and retrieval-augmented pipelines. I design and ship end-to-end solutions – from data ingestion and content enrichment through model evaluation, deployment, and iteration – with a consistent focus on accuracy, scalability, and communicating findings to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.

bullets: Architected a Python-based three-tier data processing framework (ingestion→transformation→distribution) by migrating a legacy .NET system, integrating structured financial data from Bloomberg, Reuters, and internal sources.

Designed data ingestion, validation, and transformation pipelines to standardize heterogeneous data (schema inconsistencies, missing values, real-time and batch feeds), reducing manual reconciliation and downstream errors.
Implemented multithreaded parallel processing to optimize ingestion, transformation, and distribution, reducing end-to-end latency under peak load.

Built and automated unit/integration testing with CI/CD pipelines (∼80% test coverage), and productionized the system with scheduling, monitoring, and fault-handling to ensure consistent, reliable delivery of time-sensitive data at high volume.

Designed and implemented validation and normalization pipelines to reconcile schema inconsistencies and mixed batch/real-time feeds across multiple sources—reducing manual reconciliation and downstream data errors.
Mentored 2 junior engineers through knowledge transfer and code reviews/walkthroughs.
Developed backend services using Spring Boot (Java) and RESTful APIs for an e-commerce application; gained exposure to scalable service design and distributed API integration patterns.
Explored containerization workflows using Docker and Kubernetes to support modern deployment pipelines; assisted in OS upgrade from RHEL 7 to RHEL 8.

education.notes: Courses: Reinforcement Learning, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Algorithms, Computer Vision, Data-Intensive Computing, Pattern Recognition, Numerical Mathematics

education.school: SRM Institute of Science and Technology
notes: Courses: Machine Learning, Computational Linguistics, Algorithms, Database Systems, Data Structures, Probability
